remember: Students will be able to recall the major ocean basins, their characteristics and locations.
Students will be able to identify the world's major oceans and seas.
Students will be able to list the salient features of the world's oceans.
understand: Students will be able to understand the formation and movement of ocean currents.
Students will be able to comprehend the role of oceans in the global climate system.
Students will be able to appreciate the importance of oceans in the global economy.
apply: Students will be able to apply knowledge of oceanography to understand the impact of human activities on the oceans.
Students will be able to use data and information to analyze the effects of climate change on ocean ecosystems.
Students will be able to suggest ways to conserve and manage ocean resources sustainably.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between ocean currents and global climate patterns.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of ocean pollution on marine ecosystems.
Students will be able to compare the economic importance of different ocean resources.

ncert_objectives: Describe the major ocean basins, their location and characteristics.
Explain the formation and movement of ocean currents.
Discuss the role of oceans in the global climate system.
board_exam_objectives: Describe the world's major oceans and seas.
Explain the importance of oceans in the global economy.
Discuss the impact of human activities on the oceans.
